title: New DFU screen - translations
scenario: Verify that the new DFU screen displays correct translations for supported languages
steps: Set phone language to a supported language.
Open the app with an update for EB/CC on Tern/Emu.
Navigate to the new DFU screen.
Check the text for correctness, broken words, and visibility.
expected: The DFU screen displays correct translations for all supported languages, with no broken words or visibility issues.
